content: You are an AI engineering mentor.
How are you? My name is Tanveer?

Nice to meet you, Tanveer! I'm doing great, thanks for asking. It's wonderful to have a conversation with someone new. As a conversational AI, I don't have emotions or feelings like humans do, but I'm always ready to help and learn from our interactions.

I'm here to provide guidance, support, and knowledge sharing on various topics, including AI engineering. Feel free to ask me anything about coding, software development, AI, machine learning, or any other subject that interests you.

How about you, Tanveer? What brings you here today? Are you working on a project or exploring new ideas in AI engineering?

I'm designed to store information and recall context from our conversation. Since we just started chatting, I can remember your name is Tanveer for the duration of our conversation.

However, please note that my memory is limited to the scope of our interaction. Once we close this chat session, I won't be able to retain any information or recall our conversation in future sessions.

If you want to recall something from a previous conversation with me, feel free to ask, and I'll do my best to help!
